---
title: Dataset Release : Nigerian Twitter Sentiment Corpus.
date: 2021-10-17
draft: true
authors:
- admin
tags:
- corpus
featured: true
# Featured image
# To use, add an image named `featured.jpg/png` to your page's folder.
# Placement options: 1 = Full column width, 2 = Out-set, 3 = Screen-width
# Focal point options: Smart, Center, TopLeft, Top, TopRight, Left, Right, BottomLeft, Bottom, BottomRight
image:
  placement: 3
  caption: 'Developing of sentiment corpus for Nigerian languages'
  focal_point: "Smart"
  preview_only: true
---



.Find out more about the project [on the preject Github page](https://github.com/hausanlp/sentiNaija)

<style>
body {
text-align: justify}
</style>
